CustomField.formula:
ISNULL(Open_ACDC_Services__c ) || ISNULL(Open_Atlassian_Agile_Services__c ) || ISNULL(Open_Atlassian_Cloud_Licenses__c ) || ISNULL (Open_Atlassian_Cloud_Services__c ) || ISNULL (Open_Atlassian_DC_Licenses__c ) || ISNULL (Open_Atlassian_ITSM_Services__c ) || ISNULL (Open_Atlassian_Services__c ) || ISNULL (Open_DevOps_Cloud_Licenses__c ) || ISNULL (Open_DevOps_Cloud_Services__c ) || ISNULL (Open_GitHub_Microsoft_Licenses__c) || ISNULL (Open_GitHub_Microsoft_Services__c) || ISNULL (Open_Managed_Services__c ) ||
ISNULL (Active_Atlassian_Agile_Services__c ) || ISNULL (Active_Atlassian_Cloud_Licenses__c ) || ISNULL (Active_Atlassian_Cloud_Services__c ) || ISNULL (Active_Atlassian_DC_Licenses__c ) || ISNULL (Active_Atlassian_ITSM_Services__c ) || ISNULL (Active_Atlassian_Services__c ) || ISNULL (Active_DevOps_Cloud_Licenses__c ) || ISNULL (Active_DevOps_Cloud_Services__c ) || ISNULL (Active_GitHub_Microsoft_Licenses__c ) || ISNULL (Active_GitHub_Microsoft_Services__c ) || ISNULL (Active_Managed_Services__c ) || ISNULL (Active_Opp_in_ACDC_Campaign__c ) ||

CustomField.label: Error Account RollUps
